high_blast_basis: C2 = Identity & Auth (auth) — auth/money/data-integrity category triggers mutation certification

certified_tests.reason: CT3 seam: C3 (Project Management) calls C2 (Identity & Auth) to resolve session; auth ownership-gating — high-blast (auth)

seeded_faults.fault: resolve_session returns identity dict even when session_token is None
seeded_faults.killed_by: test_ct3_failure_no_valid_session — asserts UnauthorizedError raised when resolve_session returns None; returning a non-None value instead makes the test fail

seeded_faults.fault: UnauthorizedError not raised when identity is None (silent pass-through)
seeded_faults.killed_by: test_ct3_failure_no_valid_session — pytest.raises(UnauthorizedError) will fail if no exception raised

seeded_faults.fault: resolve_session exception swallowed and not re-wrapped as SessionResolutionError
seeded_faults.killed_by: test_ct3_failure_callee_error — pytest.raises(SessionResolutionError) fails if runtime error silently swallowed

certified_tests.reason: AC6: ownership-scoped project CRUD — freelancer can only manage their own projects; session-gated create/edit/delete requires active auth

seeded_faults.fault: project create succeeds for unauthenticated request (no session check)
seeded_faults.killed_by: test_f4_failure_ct3_no_valid_session (flow) + ac6 tests assert 2xx only after valid session token

seeded_faults.fault: project list returns projects from a different freelancer's scope
seeded_faults.killed_by: test_ac6_create_project_appears_in_list / test_ac6_held_out_create_project_appears_in_list — different session tokens yield different scopes; cross-contamination would cause held-out to show visible projects

seeded_faults.fault: delete does not remove project from list (no-op delete)
seeded_faults.killed_by: test_ac6_delete_project_removed_from_list and held-out equivalent assert project absent after delete

seeded_faults.fault: edit does not persist updated name/rate
seeded_faults.killed_by: test_ac6_edit_project_name_and_rate / held-out assert updated values present in subsequent list

uncertified_tests.reason: CT2: C3/C1 shared_data seam; C1 (Data Store) not a high-blast component (no auth/money ownership-gate logic in this seam alone)
CT9: C6/C3 dispatch seam; no auth/money logic in the dispatch layer itself
